videos.headline: Rourke connects on a deep TD pass
videos.description: Nathan Rourke finds Andrew Meyer, who reels in a 40-yard touchdown pass.

videos.headline: Ohio forces Bowling Green turnover
videos.description: Chad Moore forces Josh Cleveland to fumble and Quentin Poling recovers the ball in the first quarter.

videos.headline: Ouellette picks up first down on fake end around
videos.description: A.J. Ouellette sells the hand off and turns it up field for a 15-yard gain at Bowling Green's 12-yard line.

videos.headline: Clair nearly gets into the end zone
videos.description: Andrew Clair gets to the outside for a 29-yard run, which would lead to a short touchdown.

videos.headline: Bowling Green picks off Rourke
videos.description: Nathan Rourke's pass is intercepted by Fred Garth who returns it 5 yards to Ohio's 46-yard line.

videos.headline: Ohio takes lead with pick-six
videos.description: Bradd Ellis intercepts James Morgan's pass and returns it for a 15-yard touchdown to put Ohio up 14-13.

videos.headline: Bowling Green forces Rourke's second interception
videos.description: Bowling Green picks off Nathan Rourke's pass for the second time, this time by Marcus Milton.

videos.headline: Rourke redeems himself with TD run
videos.description: After throwing an interception, Nathan Rourke drives Ohio down the field and finishes it off with a 7-yard TD run.

videos.headline: Ohio takes lead with first TD
videos.description: Nathan Rourke pitches to A.J. Ouellette for a 6-yard touchdown run.

videos.headline: Rourke breaks free for TD
videos.description: Nathan Rourke comes right back after a Bowling Green touchdown and rushes for a 75-yard touchdown.

videos.headline: Ouellette runs it up the gut for TD
videos.description: A.J. Ouellette's 2-yard touchdown run stretches Ohio's lead to 18.

videos.headline: Miller puts Bowling Green in the red zone with big catch and run
videos.description: Scott Miller catches a pass from James Morgan and escapes a tackle for a for a 69-yard catch and run that would lead to a short touchdown.

videos.headline: Rourke scores 3rd TD
videos.description: Nathan Rourke muscles in a 1-yard touchdown run for his third touchdown of the game.
